channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Many hedges are overhanging/overgrown along this footpath, 1st June
item.description:
Need cutting ASAP- obstructing narrow public footpath/right of way
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Southcourt Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Both footpaths on arden road damaged and uneven - dangerous trip hazard, 1st June
item.description:
See above - reported before
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Arden Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Loose BT cover - unstable, noisy and not fixed, 1st June
item.description:
See above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Hall Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree completely blocking bridlepath gate, 1st June
item.description:
The gate is on the bridlepath at the end of Lodilow Lane, immediately before the bridge over the stream. The bridlepath the gate opens on to goes around the Wingmoor Farm Recycling depot and ends up in Brockhampton. The gateway is completely blocked and impassable by humans or horses. Has been blocked for less than a fortnight.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lowdilow Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st June
item.description:
Overgrown vegetation obscuring FW Please cut back to boundaries. 25m approx 2 wqy stop and go with temp FW closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes with white dots still not repaired - end of hall rd, 1st June
item.description:
See above - inadequate repairs to hall rd. Needs resurfacing asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Hall Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop line requires refreshing, 1st June
item.description:
Pedestrian Crossing PC-301 Lansdown Road (Shelburne Road, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88a, Lansdown Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Fly tipping by waitrose ataurs, 1st June
item.description:
There has been fly tipping in the gap by the Waitrose stairs multiple times over the past week, including furniture, cardboard (some with personal details/addresses on) and bags of rubbish The W3W for the location is ///wonderfully.robots.softly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Great Western Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree and bushes over grown uo cover street light and in garden, 1st June
item.description:
Corner of gramham place and nearest house 124 hesters way road been like it for months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Hesters Way Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Incorrect Road Sign, 1st June
item.description:
The new road sign says 'Dog Lane', this is incorrect. The road it is on that corresponds with our address and maps is infact 'Crickley Hill' or sometimes 'Crickley Hill Road', that leads to 'Dog Lane' past our property as it turns into a single track lane further up. This causes numerous problems to us and the business as deliveries etc cannot find the property, as they read 'Dog Lane' which is incorrect.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dog Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked over double yellow lines, 1st June
item.description:
There is a car parked over double yellow lines at the entrance to Insley Gardens. The car was parked over double yellow lines from circa 18:00 31.05 to 08:30 01.06, and again at time of reporting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Insley Gardens, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 1st June
item.description:
Nwd Overgrown hedge Approx 8 mtrs length From gates to post 4 at dropped kerb Needs cutting back to boundary Give and take (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 1st June
item.description:
NOISY COVER Please replace lid 28 Days- STOP & GO STATS (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)

item.title: Keep left bollard has been knocked over, 1st June
item.description:
On approach to Hyde lane from the traffic lights crossroads the bollard has been knocked over completely
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Overgrown vegetation and leaning pole, 1st June

Opposite 2 Little Hills Cottages. Bus stop invisible when approaching from Gloucester direction

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 1st June
item.description:
Cw pothole 1100x400x40mm Temp rd closure (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 1st June
item.description:
The water level appears to be very high in one of the drains and looks like it may spill out. The water itself is very brown and the customer is concerned that something may have been deposited down the gulley which is hazardous. They ask that this is investigated.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 1st June
item.description:
CW Pothole 1200mm x 600mm x 42mm Temporary Closure 15min db TM Outside number 26 (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 1st June
item.description:
Fw kerbing Rhs dropper needs resetting Stats required Give and take (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter picker, 1st June
item.description:
I have left bag of recycling by bin ref:- 0230 which is near to the Grayhound pub traffic lights on Cheltenham road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucestershire Cycle Spine, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection
